message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Session Management Sequence Diagram

actor UI as ui
participant "sessionRoute" as route
participant passport
participant SessionController
database innoDB

ui -> route: GET() "/session"\nAuth: Bearer token\n{userID, DASS21_SCORES, sessionDetails}

activate route
route -> passport: "/save", authenticate("jwt")
activate passport

alt Success: Authenticated
    passport --> route: done(null, user)
    
    route -> SessionController: Request Products
    activate SessionController
    
    alt Success: Required info provided
        SessionController -> SessionController: Validate info
        SessionController -> innoDB: saveSession()
        activate innoDB
        innoDB --> SessionController: session
        deactivate innoDB
        
        SessionController --> route: httpResponse(200)\nsession
        route --> ui: httpResponse(200)\nallProducts
    else Failure: missing information
        SessionController --> route: {"msg":"missing required information"}(400)
        route --> ui: http Response(400)\n{"msg":"missing required information"}
    end
    
    deactivate SessionController
else Failure: Unauthorized
    passport --> route: done(null,false)
    route --> ui: http Response(401)\nUnauthorized
end

deactivate passport
deactivate route

@enduml
```
